nodes.name: Configuration
nodes.notes: Set key parameters for the workflow. By default the browser is visible (headless=false) for debugging, can be set to true for production.

nodes.name: Get Foreclosures Needing Property Info
nodes.notes: Retrieves foreclosure records from Airtable that need property information enrichment. Filters to only include Ulster County records with SBL numbers but without Owner data.

nodes.name: Initialize Browser
nodes.notes: Initializes a Puppeteer browser instance. Headless mode is controlled by the Configuration node, with visibility enabled by default.

nodes.name: Process Each Foreclosure
nodes.notes: Processes foreclosure records one at a time to avoid overloading the property database.

nodes.name: Extract Property Info
nodes.notes: Uses Puppeteer to navigate the Ulster County property database, search by SBL number, and extract property information.

nodes.name: Update Foreclosure Record
nodes.notes: Updates the foreclosure record in Airtable with the property information extracted from the website.

nodes.name: All Records Processed?
nodes.notes: Checks if all records have been processed to determine whether to close the browser or continue processing.

nodes.name: Close Browser
nodes.notes: Properly closes the browser instance when all records have been processed.
